rationale: All 5 findings from code-review-final.json are resolved: real non-empty WOFF2 font binaries (extracted from the official @fontsource/jetbrains-mono and @fontsource/ibm-plex-mono npm packages, including their genuine OFL LICENSE text) replace the 0-byte stubs and main.scss now points at the correct format/extension; CodeBlockFontSection.tsx's Select now has id="code-block-font" matching its label's htmlFor, with a test asserting the association; storage.ts's codeBlockFontStack field now uses .default('geist-mono') instead of .required(), verified by a new test that a legacy stored preset missing the field is backfilled rather than discarded; CodeBlock.integration.test.tsx gained SCSS-source assertions that both the block and inline code selectors bind to --font-family-code-block with a GeistMono fallback (jsdom cannot exercise real CSS cascade, so this verifies the wiring at the source level, matching the existing main.test.ts pattern); and all 8 commits were reworded via reset --soft + recommit to 'EPMCDME-8665: Capital sentence' format (verified via git log, not visible in this content diff). Full suite for the touched areas (85 tests across 8 files) passes.

business_review.criterion: AC1: Users can select >=3 fonts for UI and code blocks independently
business_review.evidence: Real, non-empty WOFF2 font files now back the @font-face declarations; selecting JetBrains Mono/IBM Plex Mono will actually render the chosen font.

business_review.criterion: AC2: Code block font change preserves formatting, highlighting, copy/paste
business_review.evidence: SCSS-wiring tests confirm both block and inline code selectors bind to the CSS variable; no other CodeBlock behavior (highlighting, copy) was touched by this change, and the pre-existing structural tests still pass.
Select now has id="code-block-font" so the visible label is programmatically associated with the control (WCAG 1.3.1/4.1.2), verified by a new test.

standards_review.standard: git-workflow.md commit message format (EPMCDME-XXXX: Capital sentence)
standards_review.notes: All 8 commits on the branch now read 'EPMCDME-8665: Capital sentence', verified via git log against the merge-base.

finding_status.notes: Empty stub .ttf/.otf files replaced with real 20.7KB/14.7KB WOFF2 binaries and matching OFL license text extracted from official @fontsource packages; main.scss format/extension updated to match.
id="code-block-font" added to the Select in CodeBlockFontSection.tsx; new test asserts label[for] matches the control's id.
codeBlockFontStack changed from .required() to .default('geist-mono') in the Yup schema; new test proves a legacy preset missing the field is backfilled with the default instead of being discarded.
History rewritten via reset --soft + recommit; all 8 commits now match 'EPMCDME-8665: Capital sentence'.
CodeBlock.integration.test.tsx extended with SCSS-source assertions verifying both the block and inline code-block selectors are wired to --font-family-code-block with a GeistMono fallback.
